title: Claim State Pension if you live abroad
body: "Choose the right claim form for your State Pension age.  If you reach State Pension age on or after 6 April 2016    Read the  Guidance about claiming if you reach State Pension age on or after 6 April 2016 (IPCBR1NSP Notes)  (PDF, 164 KB, 12 pages).   Fill in the  Claim form if you reach State Pension age on or after 6 April 2016 (IPCBR1NSP)  (PDF, 457 KB, 15 pages).   Tell us where to pay your State Pension.    If you reached State Pension age before 6 April 2016    Read the  Guidance about claiming if you reached State Pension age before 6 April 2016 (IPCBR1 Notes )  (PDF, 159 KB, 12 pages).   Fill in the  Claim form if you reached State Pension age before 6 April 2016 (IPCBR1)  (PDF, 472 KB, 16 pages).   Tell us where to pay your State Pension.    Tell us where to pay your State Pension  We will pay you pension directly into an account. This is called ‘International Pensions Direct Payment’.    Read the  Guidance about International Pensions Direct Payment  (PDF, 111 KB, 8 pages).   Fill in the appropriate form for the country where you want your State Pension paid. If there is no form for the country where you want your State Pension paid, fill in “If your country is not listed: tell us where to send your State Pension general form”.     Australia: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 176 KB, 4 pages)   Belize: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 172 KB, 4 pages)   Brazil: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 181 KB, 4 pages)   Canada (if you are a trustee): tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 177 KB, 4 pages)   Canada (if you are not a trustee): tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 182 KB, 4 pages)   Chile: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)   (PDF, 176 KB, 5 pages)   Costa Rica: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 174 KB, 4 pages)   Denmark: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 176 KB, 4 pages)   Dominican Republic: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 178 KB, 4 pages)   Eswatini: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 174 KB, 4 pages)   Gambia: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 171 KB, 4 pages)   Ghana: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 186 KB, 4 pages)   Guatemala: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)   (PDF, 177 KB, 5 pages)   Guyana: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 186 KB, 4 pages)   Hong Kong: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 184 KB, 4 pages)   India: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 184 KB, 4 pages)   Indonesia: tell us where to pay your State Pension (IPC1394)  (PDF, 178 KB, 4 pages)   Ireland (if you want your pension paid into...
